title: Sqlitelogictest: Aggregation query with distinct clause produces duplicated rows
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, score REAL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, score, created_at) VALUES(1, 'Alice', 95.5, '2023-01-01 10:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, score, created_at) VALUES(2, 'Bob', 85.0, '2023-01-02 11:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, score, created_at) VALUES(3, 'Charlie', 95.5, '2023-01-01 10:00:00');
SELECT DISTINCT score, name FROM test_table WHERE score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY score;
CREATE TABLE another_table(ref_id INTEGER, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
key_bug_features: Aggregation query with distinct clause produces duplicates
